SyntheticAutonomicMind.tagline: Privacy-first AI tools. Free, open source, and built to work the way you do.

SyntheticAutonomicMind/SAM.description: Native macOS AI assistant with voice control, local model support, and persistent memory

SyntheticAutonomicMind/CLIO.description: Terminal-first AI coding assistant with real tool execution and multi-agent coordination

SyntheticAutonomicMind/ALICE.description: Local Stable Diffusion image generation with OpenAI-compatible API and private gallery
